contracts.cross_language: literal frontend HTTP calls resolve to unique decorated backend routes as call edges
contracts.extensions: language-specific fields are namespaced; core contains source path and resolver evidence
contracts.resolved_call: evidence is resolved and target_id uniquely identifies an indexed symbol
contracts.serialization: UTF-8, canonical sorted-key compact JSON, LF, one final newline per record
contracts.spans: one-based columns and lines; end positions are inclusive of the represented syntactic span
contracts.unresolved_call: evidence is unresolved and target_id is omitted
